title: EarthMC Chat Tools
description: This is a client-side mod for playing on the server EarthMC, which blocks certain messages like advertising, so your chat flow is better
body:
# The EarthMC Chat Tools
This mod is made for use on the Minecraft server EarthMC ([More info about the server](https://earthmc.net/)).
It improves chat quality using the following features:
## Message filtering
Are you annoyed by all the ads floating around EarthMC at the moment? You can block them using this mod. You can also filter messages by known scammers, or the 500th player asking how to tp to other players in chat.
## Message alerts
Instead of filtering messages, you can also just be sent a warning.
Additionally, there can be a "ping" sound on certain messages.
## GitHub
The code for this project can be found [in this GitHub repository](https://github.com/Schlaumeier5/EarthMC-Chat-Tools/)
